div1.entryFree: Garb, form, manner, way, mode of doing some thing: he could not speak English in the native g. H5 V, 1, 80. commanding peace even with the same austerity and g. as he controlled the war, Cor. IV, 7, 44. let me comply with you in this g. Hml. II, 2, 390. constrains the g. quite from his nature, Lr. II, 2, 103. abuse him to the Moor in the rank g. Oth. II, 1, 315.
